description: Lock the 2026-06-27 port crane correction that scopes the node to physical dockside lifting and crane-gate infrastructure rather than shipping-contract administration.

checks.reason: The corrected node uses the earliest documented stationary harbor-crane chronology while keeping explicit date uncertainty.
The node is physical harbor crane and crane-gate infrastructure, so construction is the direct enabling capability.
Charterparty contracts are ship-hire documents and should not be a direct prerequisite for physical dockside crane works.
The node remains physical harbor infrastructure and should not reacquire a navigation-document prerequisite.
Fortified water gates are defensive wall and river-access infrastructure; they should not depend directly on the later stationary harbor-crane node.
